subject: Website Samples
value: Mandla is building a portfolio collection of website samples across different industries to demonstrate range in branding, visual systems, layouts, interactions, and audience-specific design.

subject: Website Samples
value: Expand the original website-sample portfolio with 50 additional business or creator niches, each paired with an appropriate theme, structure, and famous-brand design inspiration.

source.conversation_topic: Expansion from thirteen website samples to fifty additional niches

subject: Website Samples
value: Define the specific brand positioning and world first, then derive the theme, visual language, page structure, photography direction, motion, and interactions from that identity. Do not begin from a generic industry template.

source.conversation_topic: Replacing generic AI website generation with authentic brand systems
